svg.title: Nova Hyperion Research Engine — Autonomous Pipeline
svg.desc: Two-column pipeline diagram showing the Chemistry Researcher (left) and Math Researcher (right) autonomous loops, both feeding into shared journal stores, ResearchWatcher, and final outputs of TTS, HTML report, email, and Nova query tool.
svg.text: Background loops running continuously alongside Nova Assistant
exact match · IUPAC rename · similarity search
GI absorption · BBB · solubility · CYP risk
EGFR · BCL2 · CDK2 · PARP1 · pose quality check
mechanism · SAR · docking · verdict · dev path
docking tables · scaffold badge · full analysis
Chemistry: ~50% pass SMILES → ~30% pass Lipinski → ~20% novel (PubChem) → ~10% pass docking → ~2% escalate to Claude
Math: ~60% pass JSON parse → ~20% verified (≥100 cases, no counterexample) → ~10% novel (arXiv) → ~3% escalate to Claude
Nova Hyperion Research Engine · Dr Tom Moir · Birkdale, Auckland, NZ
